title: Method for constructing a 3d representation of a conduit internal surface
abstract: A method for constructing a three-dimensional representation of an internal surface of a conduit comprises obtaining a plurality of images of the internal surface of the conduit, for example from a camera mounted on an inspection tool, constructing, from the plurality of images, a composite image of the internal surface, providing a shape model of the internal surface, constructing, using the shape model, a three- dimensional mesh of the internal surface, and constructing a three-dimensional representation of the internal surface by assigning a pixel value from the composite image to a corresponding node of the mesh. The three-dimensional representation may be derived from two or more sets of images obtained under different image acquisition conditions, such as different camera angles, lighting conditions or spectral sensitivities.
claims:
Claims 1. A method for constructing a three-dimensional representation of an internal surface of a conduit, comprising: obtaining a plurality of images of the internal surface of the conduit; constructing, from the plurality of images, a composite image of the internal surface; providing a shape model of the internal surface; constructing, using the shape model, a three-dimensional mesh of the internal surface; and constructing a three-dimensional representation of the internal surface by assigning a pixel value from the composite image to a corresponding node of the mesh. 2. A method according to Claim 1 , further comprising aligning the position and/or orientation of the composite image and the shape model. 3. A method according to Claim 1 or Claim 2, wherein the mesh is constructed such that a node density of the mesh equals a pixel resolution of the composite image. 4. A method according to any preceding claim, wherein providing the shape model of the internal surface comprises obtaining a plurality of radius measurements of the internal surface of the conduit. 5. A method according to Claim 4, comprising obtaining the plurality of radius measurements when obtaining the plurality of images. 6. A method according to any preceding claim, comprising correcting the plurality of images for lens and/or geometrical distortions. 7. A method according to any preceding claim, comprising: 

 obtaining at least two sets of images of a common area of the internal surface; and constructing, from each set of images, a respective composite image of the common area; wherein constructing the three-dimensional representation of the internal surface comprises assigning a pixel value from each composite image to a corresponding node of the mesh. 8. A method according to Claim 7, comprising selecting, for each node, a pixel value from one of the composite images for display in the three-dimensional representation. 9. A method according to Claim 8, comprising selecting the pixel value from one of the composite images automatically according to a viewing condition of the three-dimensional representation. 10. A method according to any of Claims 7 to 9, wherein each set of images is obtained under different image acquisition conditions. 11. A method according to Claim 10, wherein each set of images is obtained using different camera angles. 12. A method according to Claim 10 or Claim 11 , wherein each set of images is obtained using different lighting conditions. 13. A method according to any of Claims 10 to 12, wherein each set of images is obtained using different spectral sensitivities.
